title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-host LLMs (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, …) behind a simple REST/CLI API with GPU/Metal acceleration.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node or browsers via fetch.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; sync & async APIs, generator streaming, PyPI package.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat component.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (models, chats, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-enhanced interactive CLI with syntax highlighting, chat history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS-Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with builders, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama: chat, generate, pull models, list, delete.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async enumerables and System.Text.Json.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image with CUDA/ROm support and docker-compose examples.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake for reproducible Ollama builds on macOS and Linux.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a local AI assistant sidebar powered by Ollama.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot server that answers channel questions using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord.py bot bringing Ollama models to your server with slash commands.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that connects to local Ollama instances.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async client and typed API for Ollama.

title: ollama-keras
summary: Keras / TensorFlow helper to fine-tune Ollama-pulled models with LoRA.
